mapper.select: select count(*) from nx_community_orders where nx_CO_user_id = #{nxOrdersUserId}

select * from nx_community_orders as o left join nx_community_orders_sub as s on s.nx_COS_orders_id = o.nx_community_orders_id left join nx_customer as c on c.nx_customer_id = o.nx_CO_customer_id left join nx_community as co on co.nx_community_id = o.nx_CO_community_id left join nx_community_goods as dg on dg.nx_community_goods_id = s.nx_COS_community_goods_id where nx_community_orders_id = #{value}

select * from nx_community_orders as o left join nx_customer_user as u on o.nx_CO_user_id = u.nx_CU_user_id left join nx_customer as c on o.nx_CO_customer_id = c.nx_customer_id left join nx_community as mm on mm.nx_community_id = o.nx_CO_community_id where o.nx_CO_weigh_user_id = #{pickerUserId} and o.nx_CO_status = #{status}

select * from nx_community_orders as o left join nx_customer as c on o.nx_CO_customer_id = c.nx_customer_id left join nx_customer_user as u on o.nx_CO_user_id = u.nx_CU_user_id left join nx_community_orders_sub as os on o.nx_community_orders_id = os.nx_community_orders_sub_id left join nx_community as mm on mm.nx_community_id = c.nx_customer_community_id where o.nx_CO_distributer_id = #{disId} and o.nx_CO_status = #{orderStatus}
and o.nx_CO_payment_status = #{paymentStatus}
select * from nx_community_orders where nx_CO_delivery_user_id = #{deliveryUserId} and nx_CO_status = #{status}
select * from nx_community_orders as nco where nco.nx_CO_wx_out_trade_no = #{ordersSn}
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_community_orders where nx_community_orders_id in
#{nxOrdersId}
